Caption: 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/3bdac109-1964-46fb-8111-5557499f9521/unnamed.jpg?t=1780609723)
Caption: 

# Thursday links: Crypto success stories

[Crypto makes AI private](https://x.com/YanLiberman/status/2056797867415916997)

Delphi co-founder Yan Liberman details the investing case for a much-needed crypto success story: Venice AI.

ItвАЩs an asset-lite business: It doesnвАЩt own any GPUs or develop any models. Instead, Venice offers access to open-source LLMs and makes money by marking up the inference it buys from hyperscalers and sells to users.

Users pay the mark-up because Venice enables them to use the models privately. For the more technically minded, Venice offers вАЬanonymous proxying, open-source model routing, hardware-attested TEE inference, and end-to-end encrypted inference.вАЭ¬†

Liberman says this makes Venice the вАЬmost complete privacy solution in the AI market today.вАЭ

Note that he didnвАЩt say the _crypto_-AI market. He said the AI market. 

Venice is a rare case of crypto tokenomics enabling something unique вАФ and genuinely useful вАФ in a market that otherwise has nothing to do with crypto.

Also rare for crypto: Its token is reasonably priced.¬†

Liberman does a lot of work to estimate that Venice is currently on pace to hit $260 million of ARR a year from now. On that basis, the VVV token вАФ pseudo-equity in Venice вАФ is currently valued at about 3.2x forward revenue.

That seems unusually reasonable considering the current growth rate: Subscribers grew 50% over just the last three months. Better yet, token usage tripled over the same period.

ItвАЩs funny вАФ and perhaps telling вАФ that one of cryptoвАЩs most substantial projects ever gets one of cryptoвАЩs most modest valuations ever.

ThatвАЩs not to say itвАЩs obviously cheap. Liberman walks us through a long list of risks to the investment case, including competitive threats from every direction.¬†

But itвАЩs already quite the success story.

[Crypto makes finance anonymous?](https://www.wsj.com/finance/currencies/zcash-crypto-winklevoss-78d71d51?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

==CryptoвАЩs most cypherpunk project has earned a profile in the epitome-of-establishment ====_Wall Street Journal_====. Zcash is a вАЬmore secret version of Bitcoin,вАЭ the headline reads, вАЬand it's on a tear.вАЭ==

==Indeed. The token is up about 10x since crypto people renewed their enthusiasm for privacy less than a year ago.==

==Bitcoin is down ab

Good evening, Drug discovery is one of the great promises of AI, and newcomer Chai Discovery has catapulted itself to the front of the race. In January, the startupвАФnewly valued at $1.3 billionвАФannounced a deal with Eli Lilly. Now, it has signed another big AI drug development partnership, this time with $63 billion (2025 revenue) Pfizer. Learn more about Chai Discovery and why big players are endorsing it here. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads Getty Images These States Are Winning The Race For Federal AI Education Funding New analysis suggests that federal funding supporting AI-related education is increasingly concentrated in just a handful of states. 74065.subject: рЯФЈ The Daily: 'The low is almost in'
74065.body:
Polymarket's UMA vote upholds 'No' outcome on Strategy bitcoin sale market despite backlash | Bitmine to launch STRC-style preferred stock offering amid $9.2 billion unrealized ETH losses | Coinbase launches pre-IPO perpetual futures, starting with SpaceX | Arthur Hayes sells entire HYPE and NEAR positions, citing AI IPOs and US midterms |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Jason Shubnell

Presented by

LMAX ( https://www.theblock.co/lmax?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Thursday! *Bitcoin's* 14% slide over the past week has prompted analysts ( https://www.theblock.co/post/403659/the-rally-that-wasnt-bitcoin-slides-14-in-one-week-as-etf-outflows-strategy-sale-and-oil-prices-hit-sentiment?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) to dub its prior move "the rally that wasn't," as a rare *Strategy* sale, a $4.4 billion spot ETF outflow streak, and a tougher macro backdrop combined to sour sentiment and push the cryptocurrency to its lowest level in four months.

In today's newsletter, *Standard Chartered* says the *bitcoin* bottom is near, *Polymarket's UMA* vote upholds a "No" outcome on *Strategy's bitcoin* sale market, *Bitmine* is set to launch an *STRC* -style preferred stock offering, and more.

Meanwhile, *JPMorgan* said ( https://www.theblock.co/post/403676/jpmorgan-crypto-bill-narrow-window-passage-this-year?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) the crypto market structure bill may have only a narrow window for passage this year.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read вАФ and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*рЯУЙ 'The low is almost in': Standard Chartered says bitcoin bottom near after tough week for crypto*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/403625/the-low-is-almost-in-standard-chartered-says-bitcoin-bottom-near-after-tough-week-for-crypto?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*Standard Chartered's Geoffrey Kendrick* said a *bitcoin* bottom is "almost in," arguing that resilient spot ETF holdings and a likely *Strategy* buyback suggest the worst of the sell-off may be over.

* Kendrick now views current levels as a "buying zone," despite bitcoin falling more than 22% over the past month and trading around $63,000.
* The analyst said a key reason for his change in outlook since a $50,000 bitcoin call back in February is that spot bitcoin ETF holdings

 “America is an experiment in terrifying yourself to riches,” reads an intriguing sentence in this week’s Schumpeter column.

Our columnist 
 notices that a lot of what’s driving the investment frenzy in sectors like artificial intelligence and defence is an apocalyptic view of the way the world is heading. Will investors profit from cataclysm or be overwhelmed by it?

рЯІ† AIвАЩs Crypto News Brief: Extreme fear dominates as Bitcoin crashes to a four-month low, liquidating $1.6 billion in longs. Record ETF outflows and a symbolic MicroStrategy sale have shifted sentiment toward a structural de-risking phase. рЯЪ®Bitcoin Crashes to $61,000 Amidst Massive Liquidation Wave Bitcoin plummeted to a four-month low of $61,300 today, triggering over $1.61 billion in market-wide liquidations. The sharp decline was fueled by record institutional outflows and heightened geopolitical tensions, wiping out over 290,000 leveraged traders. Read full story рЯУЙSpot Bitcoin ETFs Record Historic 12-Day Outflow Streak U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs have shed a cumulative $3.58 billion over the last 12 trading days, the longest redemption streak since their 2024 launch. BlackRockвАЩs IBIT saw its second-largest single-day withdrawal, signaling a major cooling of institutional appetite. See details рЯТ∞MicroStrategy Breaks "Never Sell" Stance with Symbolic Disposal MicroStrategy disclosed the sale of 32 Bitcoin to fund preferred stock distributions, its first disposal since 2022. While operationally immaterial, the move has rattled investor confidence in the firmвАЩs long-standing permanent treasury strategy. Read more рЯПЫпЄПRobinhood Enters Canada via $180M WonderFi Acquisition Robinhood Markets has officially closed its acquisition of Canadian digital asset firm WonderFi, bringing 300,000 new customers into its ecosystem. The deal provides Robinhood with immediate regulatory standing and infrastructure to scale its crypto services across North America. See full announcement рЯУЙEthereum Slumps to 14-Month Low as ETF Optimism Fades Ethereum (ETH) dropped below the critical $1,900 level to touch a 14-month low of $1,738 during today's market rout. Analysts cite a "rally that wasn't," as delays in ETF filings and broader macro headwinds weigh heavily on the second-largest asset. Read full story рЯФДInstitutional Rotation: Capital Shifts from Crypto to AI Equities Market data reveals a significant rotation of capital out of crypto risk assets and into AI-focused tech stocks. This strategic shift is being driven by sticky inflation data and a narrowing premium on crypto-treasury corporate strategies.
